channel.title: Elliott Bay Book Company Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Elliott Bay Book Company Events

item.title: Rachel Griffin, THE SUN AND THE STARMAKER
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A meet and greet with Rachel Griffin!

Event details

item.title: Virtual: Louise Erdrich w/ Ann Patchett, PYTHON'S KISS
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: 1521 10th Ave, Seattle, WA 98122

From Pulitzer Prize and National Book Award-winning author Louise Erdrich, a captivating collection of short stories

Event details

item.title: From the Natural World w/ Nadine Maestas, M. Elliott, & Vitoria Ramos
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

Elliott Bay Book Co. and Gamut present OFFICE HOURS: A Reading Series Readings from the Natural World

Event details

item.title: Rebecca Brown w/ Christopher Frizzelle, MY ANIMAL KINGDOM
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

Rebecca Brown adopted a baby squirrel, and it changed her life.

Event details

item.title: Bootsy Holler w/ Troy Nelson, MAKING IT
item.description:
Monday, March 30, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

'Making It: An Intimate Documentary of the Seattle Indie, Rock & Punk Scene, 1992-2008'

Event details

item.title: Kim Samek w/ Josh Riedel, I AM THE GHOST HERE: STORIES
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

In which twelve women confront the mounting existential terrors of modern life

Event details

item.title: Ashley McGirt w/ Marcus Harrison Green, THE COST OF HEALING IN SILENCE
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

An up-to-date and expert discussion of how to create a more culturally responsive mental health care system

Event details

item.title: J.M. Sidorova w/ Rashida J. Smith, THE WITCH OF PRAGUE
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A work of magical realism set during the 1968 Prague Spring about bodily autonomy and the fight against authoritarian regimes everywhere.

Event details

item.title: [SOLD OUT] Tracy Deonn, LEGENDBORN & OATHBOUND
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

Bestselling YA author Tracy Deonn visits the store for the release of 'Legendborn' Collector's Edition and the paperback of 'Oathbound'

Event details

item.title: Minh Nguyen w/ Charles Mudede, MEMORIAL PARK: REVISITING VIETNAM
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A collection of essays pairing travelogue and criticism, fifty years after the Fall of Saigon

Event details

item.title: Lily Brooks-Dalton, RUINS
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

“Lily Brooks-Dalton's novels are rich literary feasts." —Geraldine Brooks, bestselling author of 'Horse'

Event details

item.title: Sujin Witherspoon w/ Rachel Runya Katz, SEYOON AND DEAN, UNSCRIPTED
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

Two teens compete to win a reality show in the woods of the PNW...but the producers frame them as rivals-to-lovers

Event details

item.title: Maile Chapman, THE SPOIL
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A mesmerizing book about the perplexities of memory, Las Vegas real estate, DIY projects, and demons

Event details

item.title: Robert Moor w/ Arik Korman, IN TREES
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A wondrous new journey through the wilds of nature and the gnarls of history, exploring how trees can teach us to grow wise

Event details

item.title: Brian Trapp w/ Laurie Frankel, RANGE OF MOTION
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A tender, wrenching, and comic novel that follows two twin boys from infancy to the cusp of adulthood

Event details

item.title: Teo Shannon w/ Michele Bombardier, A CHRONOLOGY OF BLOOD
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

The poems in a chronology of blood embrace trauma survivors, the LGBTQ+ community, and lovers of poetry

Event details

item.title: Tiffany Tsao & Gabriella Page-Fort: The Unique World of Author-Translators
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

Discussing the synergies and tensions of writing/translating while translating/writing.

Event details

item.title: Brandon Bye w/ Lisa van Dam-Bates & Nate Gowdy, MORE PAINT
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

More Paint is a meditation on power and place, capturing Seattle at a crossroads where homelessness, graffiti, and civic control collide

Event details

item.title: Ellen Morris Bishop, LIVING WITH THUNDER
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A landmark investigation into forensic medicine exposing systematic concealment of state-sanctioned violence through death investigations

Event details

item.title: Jake Rose, JOAN
item.description:
Wednesday, April 22, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A narrative sequence of lyric poems reimagining Joan of Arc as a framework for queer identity, transformation, and poetic voice

Event details

item.title: Kanako Nishi & Allison Markin Powell w/ Gabriella Page-Fort, SAKURA
item.description:
Thursday, April 23, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

The Japanese bestseller 'Sakura' is available in English at last!

Event details

item.title: Marcus Kliewer w/ Sadie Hartmann, THE CARETAKER
item.description:
Friday, April 24, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

What starts as a peculiar side gig soon becomes a waking nightmare...

Event details

item.title: David Szalay, FLESH
item.description:
Monday, April 27, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

The winner of the Booker Prize 2025 visits the store!

Event details

item.title: Raúl Sánchez w/ Priscilla Long, WHEN WE WERE WATER
item.description:
Tuesday, April 28, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

An abundant new work that continues to experiment in forms and shapes, always with humor and human vitality

Event details

item.title: Jordan Ritter Conn w/ Sarah Enni, AMERICAN MEN: AN INVESTIGATION
item.description:
Wednesday, April 29, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A deeply intimate portrait of the lives of four men that examines—in profound and comprehensive ways—what it means to be a man in America

Event details

item.title: Erin L. McCoy, UNDERLAKE
item.description:
Thursday, April 30, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A richly glittering debut about the interlocked fates of two women, raised worlds apart, who must join forces on an extraordinary journey

Event details

item.title: Alexandra Oliva w/ Thomas Kohnstamm, THE RADIANT DARK
item.description:
Friday, May 8, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A bold and compassionate exploration of the universe around us and what it truly means to be human

Event details

item.title: Ed Taylor w/ Enrique Cerna, THE POWER OF THE RIVER
item.description:
Friday, May 22, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A memoir steeped in the universal truths and human pursuits of love, grace, forgiveness, and continued growth

Event details
